title: Self Dick
lyrics: When it all becomes clear Your fears are here When it all becomes so crystal fucking clear It takes self-discipline To know when you're right To know when you're wrong You hear me or not It takes self-discipline To continue this fight Even though you've been wrong And you can't see anything From what you saw from before It takes self-discipline To infer it's time to not Ignore all the dead at your doorstep Ignore all the ways that you can't take one more step Why is it that you brought yourself here again? Just to fall It takes self-discipline To know that's not the end No, no, no It's just the beginning my friend Of me And me seeing me Get a little self-discipline Make my dreams come true Instead of catering to you Care about me, how will I do? It takes self-discipline To tell you all to go Fuck it and to hell Bye bye motherfucker, bye bye Hope you take a stone well Hope you tell how I was just so outrageous That I made you do shit after giving so fucking much And I just wanted a little accountability For the things you asked And how many times I saved you from the war inside of you But now I gotta love you So it's bye bye Sorry if it needs something up in there But sorry don't cut it no more You're just a fucking bore Would've given if you just would've asked But now I see that it's on me All these things so I don't blame I forgive but don't worry We'll never get that close again I got the self-discipline For me I don't need to hear Excuses of a mile long I know it's my choice that led me wrong That's why I build these walls up now So you never get past me That loves me, denies self-discipline I ain't find nothing inside It's not the hype It's creating love unconditional for you Even though I'm the one that fucked up now I know it's my choice that led me here So I'm gonna give you a pass this time Motherfucker, this time There won't be a next time Believe that Got self-discipline And you can't see Your hate won't bring me down, motherfucking bitch

lyricsSegments.text: When it all becomes clear Your fears are here
When it all becomes so crystal fucking clear
It takes self-discipline To know when you're right
To know when you're wrong You hear me or not
It takes self-discipline To continue this fight
Even though you've been wrong And you can't see anything
From what you saw from before It takes self-discipline
To infer it's time to not Ignore all the dead at your doorstep
Ignore all the ways that you can't take one more step
Why is it that you brought yourself here again?
Just to fall
It takes self-discipline To know that's not the end
No, no, no
It's just the beginning my friend
Of me
And me seeing me
Get a little self-discipline Make my dreams come true
Instead of catering to you
Care about me, how will I do?
It takes self-discipline To tell you all to go
Fuck it and to hell
Bye bye motherfucker, bye bye
Hope you take a stone well
Hope you tell how I was just so outrageous
That I made you do shit after giving so fucking much
And I just wanted a little accountability
For the things you asked
And how many times I saved you from the war inside of you
But now I gotta love you
So it's bye bye
Sorry if it needs something up in there
But sorry don't cut it no more
You're just a fucking bore
Would've given if you just would've asked
But now I see that it's on me
All these things so I don't blame
I forgive but don't worry
We'll never get that close again
I got the self-discipline
For me
I don't need to hear
Excuses of a mile long
I know it's my choice that led me wrong
That's why I build these walls up now
So you never get past me
That loves me, denies self-discipline
I ain't find nothing inside
It's not the hype
It's creating love unconditional for you
Even though I'm the one that fucked up now
I know it's my choice that led me here
So I'm gonna give you a pass this time
Motherfucker, this time
There won't be a next time
Believe that
Got self-discipline
And you can't see
Your hate won't bring me down, motherfucking bitch
